leadText: Psyblade (Japanese: サイコブレイド Psycho Blade) is a damage-dealing Psychic-type move introduced during Generation IX. It is the signature move of Iron Leaves.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Psyblade inflicts damage. If there is Electric Terrain on the field, its base power is increased to 120, whether or not the user is grounded . If used by a Pokémon with Sharpness , its power is increased by 50%.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V The user rends the target with an ethereal blade. This move's power is boosted by 50 percent if the user is on Electric Terrain.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Among the signature moves of the six Paradox Pokémon connected to Legendary Pokémon , Psyblade is the only one to not match its user 's primary type , namely Grass . Psyblade is the only non- Electric-type move to benefit from a power boost from Electric Terrain .
